event_findings.evidence: Gecko stays perched while a small greenish item appears at/near the mouth; human finger enters around 8s, consistent with feeding interaction rather than normal locomotion.
Gecko remains in same position with subtle mouth/head changes; no clear walking, drinking, hiding, basking, defecating, or shedding behavior visible.

evidence: Key frames show the gecko on a wooden perch with minimal body displacement. A possible prey item is visible near the mouth in several frames, and the later frames show slight mouth opening/closing posture.
uncertainty_notes: The suspected prey item is small and partly ambiguous; major detected motion may be from camera/hand intrusion rather than the gecko. Human review recommended.
